news.t: SoFi Debuts ETF to Target Companies Focused on AI
SoFi launches new AI-themed ETF as skepticism grows
SoFi Announces the Agentic AI ETF, Providing Access to Next Wave of AI

holdings.infoBox: AGIQ is an equity ETF with a total of 27 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.88%, NVIDIA at 7.65%, Palo Alto Networks at 7.28%, Teradyne at 6.92%, and QUALCOMM at 6.89%.

overview.description: The SoFi Agentic AI ETF (AGIQ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the BITA US Agentic AI Select index. The fund tracks an index comprised of US companies advancing agentic AI. Holdings span areas such as autonomous systems, cloud, cybersecurity, and semiconductors. AGIQ was launched on Sep 2, 2025 and is issued by SoFi.
infoTable: BITA US Agentic AI Select Index

data.title: SoFi Debuts ETF to Target Companies Focused on AI
data.text: Digital finance app SoFi has introduced its SoFi Agentic AI exchange-traded fund (ETF). The ETF, dubbed AGIQ, will invest in American companies that are part of the BITA US Agentic AI Select Index, So...

data.title: SoFi launches new AI-themed ETF as skepticism grows
data.text: SoFi Technologies jumped back into the exchange-traded fund business on Wednesday with its first launch in nearly two years, betting on artificial intelligence, the hottest theme in retail investing.

data.title: SoFi Announces the Agentic AI ETF, Providing Access to Next Wave of AI
data.text: SAN FRANCISCO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SoFi (NASDAQ: SOFI) is announcing the availability of a new exchange-traded fund (ETF) with the SoFi Agentic AI ETF (NYSE Arca: AGIQ). AGIQ will invest in U.S. companie...
